responsibilities: Build and maintain scalable, self-service data platform infrastructure used by data engineers and analysts
Provision and manage cloud data infrastructure using infrastructure-as-code tools such as Terraform
Ensure high availability and reliability of core data platform services through proactive monitoring and alerting
Design multi-tenant data platform architectures that balance performance, security, and resource isolation
Implement observability tooling to track platform health, pipeline SLAs, and resource utilization metrics
Optimize compute and storage costs across the data platform through resource right-sizing and tiering strategies
Manage access control and security policies governing data platform usage across the organization
Collaborate with data engineering teams to standardize tooling and reduce friction in pipeline development
Automate platform operations such as scaling, failover, and incident response for critical data services
Evaluate and onboard new data platform technologies to improve developer experience and platform capabilities
